metadata.projectName: OptimoStudio™ RCM Integration — Full 5-Perspective Triage Analysis
metadata.initiatedBy: Joel Embry / RCM Skill via Claude Code

objectives: Complete full triage analysis of OptimoStudio build across Slack, Lovable, GitHub, and Confluence
Assess current build state: Phase 3 (Build) with all 5 panels shipped, mock data active
Evaluate production readiness and identify remaining blockers
Design RCM integration strategy as a 6th panel or embedded capability within OptimoStudio
Deliver actionable implementation plans with dependency graphs and time estimates
Surface security and compliance risks before production deployment

evidence.finding: Genesis Hub announcement posted 2026-06-22 by Joel Embry. All 4 stakeholders (Joel, Collin, Barbara, Susan) gave 'Go' greenlight within 24 hours. Huddle held 2026-06-23 for build review.

Project 'Optimo Command' — status 'completed', commit 77c39c16. 94 files across TanStack Start + Supabase + shadcn/ui stack. All 5 panels built with mock data. Multi-provider LLM backend (Anthropic + DeepSeek) active with client-side API key override.
Phase 1-2 Complete, Phase 3 Active, Phase 4-5 Pending. Full functional spec, technical architecture, build outputs, and Jira execution documented across 9 child pages.
STUD-9 (Foundation) Done. STUD-10-14 (Panels) In Progress. STUD-15 (Hardening) still in Idea status. STUD-16 (Deploy) Pending. All epics created 2026-06-23.
No GitHub repository found for OptimoStudio. Code lives exclusively in Lovable cloud with no external version control, CI/CD, or PR review pipeline.
Detailed build state as of 2026-06-23. 28 skills in 5 categories, 9 ventures, multi-provider LLM with DeepSeek PowerShell auto-redirect. Remaining: Atlassian tokens, Vercel deploy, hardening, UAT.
